top_comments: As a 17-year-old, I think the old songs were way better than what we have nowadays, especially in lyrics.

Cold foggy late december nights, a hot masala chai in hand, sitting near sabarthi dhabha in 1996 in JNU campus, recollect singing those songs with fellow students. As usual a loyal sincere fan of yours and your passionate team :)
Someone sent this to me....leaving this comment here,  whenever i'll get any notification regarding this comment... I'll remember that person,  my most special one with a smile in my face.........🤍🧿
